title: Kosen plush horse — face patch, remade ear and brow, new eyes
description: This Kosen white plush horse had face and body damage — we patched the holes, remade an ear and eyebrow, fitted new eyes, and closed tears so the realistic German plush looks complete again.
itemDetails: Kosen white plush horse is associated with Kosen (Koesen), the German plush maker established in 1912 and known for naturalistic animal design. Kosen pieces are often produced to a higher realism standard than mass-market plush lines. Construction may include premium synthetic or natural-look pile fabrics, carefully shaped forms, and firm but soft stuffing for display-quality silhouette.
repairDetails: The horse had holes in the body and face where stuffing was showing, plus tears along stressed seams. We patched those areas and closed the tears with matching pile direction. A damaged ear and eyebrow were remade, replacement eyes were fitted, and the head was shaped so the expression reads naturally again for display.
